tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mild hypoglycemia, mild hyperchloremia, and low total CO₂, which may suggest a non-anion gap metabolic acidosis. Renal function and electrolytes are otherwise within normal limits. Clinical correlation and further evaluation for underlying causes (e.g., gastrointestinal loss, renal tubular acidosis) are recommended.

text.div: Provider Organization: St Matthews Health & Community Centre
Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
